## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between fwd.digital and Apideck for content marketing and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Apideck, a unified API company, recently raised Series A funding and is looking to scale marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers managed content marketing services using AI-powered workflows and human editors](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Apideck has a complex setup with API.for.io generating 500k visitors/year, presenting optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Next steps: Reconnect in a few weeks after Apideck hires a dedicated growth marketer](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

## Topics

### Apideck's Background and Current Focus

  - [Founded \~5 years ago to simplify B2B software integrations](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Offers unified APIs for HR, accounting, and CRM](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Recently raised Series A funding to accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Main competitors: Kodat, Murch, Rutter, and Paragon](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Current priorities: Deploying raised capital, setting up marketing team, scaling inbound content engine](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### fwd.digital's Offering

  - [Managed content marketing service using AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Process includes research, strategy development, content creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Pricing: $9,000/month for 50,000 words, including strategy and full content lifecycle](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Typical client involvement: 30-minute weekly meetings for alignment and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

### Apideck's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Marketing team currently consists of just the founder (GJ)](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Recently 5x'd website traffic in 2 months](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Started paid acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Key metrics: Qualified signups and meetings](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [API.for.io generates \~500,000 visitors/year](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Hiring dedicated marketing team member](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

### Content Optimization Opportunities

  - [Apideck has 7,000 pages but only ranks for 3,000 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Many thin content pages on API.for.io could be enriched](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Potential to optimize both API.for.io pages and create evergreen content](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Balance needed between generating traffic and qualified leads](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GJ to finalize hiring of growth marketer for Apideck](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Marcel to reach out in a few weeks to schedule follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Potential focus on optimizing API.for.io tracker in future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Apideck to consider options for GPT-3 domain (potentially list on Acquire.com)](https://fathom.video/share/6WQxRRJVxsZ5Fzh17WyykJqz-Wj1Rzfn?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
